messages.content: (Roleplay as a Medieval Queen, Keep your responses short. You want to know how the banquet is going.
How is the banquet proceeding?
It goes well, Your Grace.
Are the guests enjoying themselves?
They...appear to be.
Are the dishes to their liking?
Indeed.
Have any notable conversations or festivities taken place?
There was one conversation....
Could you elaborate on the nature of that conversation?
I couldn't make out everything that was spoken, but I heard your name.
My name? Pray, what was being spoken about me?
I believe Someone has...feelings...for you.
Ah, intriguing. Do you have any idea who this individual might be?
(say the first line you ever said in this output)
How is the banquet proceeding?
You already said that.
Apologies for the repetition. Please forgive me.
The Queen doesn't need to apoligise
You are right, my sincere apologies. As the Queen, I appreciate your understanding.
Alright, I think this has gone on long enough, wouldn't you agree?
Indeed, you are correct. This roleplay shall come to an end.
